basic_details.job_title: Patna High Court Computer Operator cum-Typist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 48 Posts
basic_details.department: High Court of Judicature at Patna
basic_details.total_vacancies: 48 posts (47 fresh + 1 backlog of Locomotor Disabled Category)
basic_details.short_information: Patna High Court has published the Computer Operator-cum-Typist Notification 2026 on 10th April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 48 Computer Operator-cum-Typist positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 37/40/42 years (category-wise) and holding a Graduation degree with a Computer Application Diploma (minimum 6 months) along with typing proficiency (40 wpm English & 30 wpm Hindi) are eligible to apply online at patnahighcourt.gov.in. The application process will be active from 17th April 2026 to 16th May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply li

application_fee.details: Fee is payable online only. Fee once paid will not be refunded. Concession of fee is admissible only to SC/ST/Locomotor Disabled candidates of Bihar.

age_limit.details: Note: Age relaxation by virtue of category shall be provided only to permanent residents of Bihar. Candidates must produce Domicile (Permanent Residential) Certificate along with Caste/Category certificate at the time of document verification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation + Diploma/Certificate of at least six months course in Computer Application + Typing proficiency (40 wpm English & 30 wpm Hindi)
qualification.details: Educational Qualification (Mandatory): Graduation in any discipline from a recognised University/Institution + Diploma/Certificate of at least six months course in Computer Application from a recognised Institution + Certificate in Typing proficiency of 40 words per minute in English and 30 words per minute in Hindi. All qualifications must be possessed as on 01.01.2026. | Nationality: Citizen of India or Tibetan refugee or person of Indian origin migrated from specified countries with intention of permanently settling in India.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-4 (₹25,500/- to ₹81,100/-) of 7th PRC plus usual allowances
salary_details.allowances: Usual allowances as admissible under the Patna High Court Officers and Staff (Recruitment, Appointment, Promotion and Other Conditions of Service and Conduct) Rules, 2021
salary_details.probation: Initially on probation for a period of one year
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be appointed in the pay scale of Computer Operator-cum-Typist (Group-C Post).

selection_process: The selection for Patna High Court Computer Operator-cum-Typist Recruitment 2026 will be based on the following:
Written Test: Part-A (MCQ Based Objective Type - 50 marks)
Minimum Qualifying Standard: 40% in Written Test (Part-A)
30% in Interview. Candidates must qualify in all stages.
Screening/Preliminary Test (if number of applicants is high): To shortlist candidates for Written Test (marks not counted in merit).
Final selection on the basis of marks in Written Test + Interview. Waiting list/panel shall remain valid for one year.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates for Patna High Court Computer Operator-cum-Typist Recruitment 2026 must submit their application online through the official website within the specified last date. The online application process is as follows:

Step 1 - Registration: Visit https://www.patnahighcourt.gov.in and click on “Recruitments” → “Computer Operator-cum-Typist Recruitment Examination, 2026” → “Apply online” → “New Registration”. Fill basic details (Name, DOB, Gender, Mobile, Email) and complete OTP validation to generate Registration Number & Password.

Step 2 - Fill Application Form: Login with credentials. Fill Personal Details, Additional Details, Communication Details, Qualification Details. Upload scanned photograph, signature and all required documents/certificates.
Step 3 - Fee Payment & Final Submission: Pay the prescribed fee online. Review all entries, submit the application and take a printout of the finally submitted form for future reference.

Note: Last date for submission of online application is 16 May 2026. Last date for fee payment is 19 May 2026. Applications submitted by any other mode will not be considered. Candidates must ensure all particulars furnished are correct. No changes allowed after final submission.
important_instructions: Candidates must possess all required qualifications as on 01.01.2026. The decision of the High Court shall be final in all matters. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Mobile phones or any electronic devices are strictly prohibited inside the examination centre. Candidates already in service must produce No Objection Certificate at the time of Interview. Furnishing false information or suppression of facts will lead to cancellation of candidature and criminal prosecution. All updates will be published only on the official website of Patna High Court. Candidates must regularly visit the website for admit card, examination dates and other information.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in Patna High Court Computer Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The High Court of Judicature at Patna has notified 48 vacancies for the post of Computer Operator‑cum‑Typist (Group‑C) under Advertisement No. PHC/02/2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for Patna High Court Computer Operator‑cum‑Typist 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications will be accepted from 17 April 2026 to 16 May 2026, and the last date for online fee payment is 19 May 2026 via the official website patnahighcourt.gov.in.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Patna High Court Computer Operator posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have: (i) Graduation in any discipline from a recognised University, (ii) a Diploma/Certificate of at least 6 months in Computer Application, and (iii) Typing proficiency certificate of 40 wpm in English and 30 wpm in Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Patna High Court Computer Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 37 years as on 01 January 2026 for unreserved male candidates, with upper‑age relaxations for female, BC/EBC, SC/ST and other categories as per the detailed advertisement and previous cycles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary/pay scale of Patna High Court Computer Operator‑cum‑Typist?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive salary in Level‑4 of the 7th PRC pay matrix (₹25,500 – ₹81,100) plus usual allowances as admissible under Patna High Court rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Patna High Court Computer Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The detailed selection process will be given in the full advertisement, and as per previous cycles it usually includes a written/online test, a computer typing test in English and Hindi and possibly a computer proficiency test, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for Patna High Court Computer Operator‑cum‑Typist 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must pay the application fee online, with category‑wise amounts and payment details specified in the detailed notification; fee can be paid up to 19 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the typing speed required for Patna High Court Computer Operator post?
faq.answer: Applicants must possess a valid certificate showing typing speed of 40 words per minute in English and 30 words per minute in Hindi from a recognised institution.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for Patna High Court Computer Operator‑cum‑Typist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Visit patnahighcourt.gov.in → Recruitment section, open the Computer Operator‑cum‑Typist (PHC/02/2026) link, register, fill the online form, upload photo/signature and documents, pay the application fee online and submit and print the final application for future reference.

faq.question: Q10. What is the cut‑off date for eligibility of qualification and age in Patna High Court Computer Operator 2026?
faq.answer: The cut‑off date is 01 January 2026, meaning candidates must meet the required educational qualifications, computer course, typing certificate and age limit on or before this date.
